narrative:
Rochester Twp & Vil township has 561 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
